name: Data Compliance Classifier MCP
description: Classify data safety before your agent stores or shares it. GDPR, HIPAA, PCI-DSS, CCPA. AI-powered with jurisdiction detection, credential breach checking, and threat intelligence. Free tier: 20/month.

tools.name: validate_data_safety
tools.description: Classify a data payload before storing or transmitting. Returns SAFE_TO_PROCESS, REDACT_BEFORE_PASSING, DO_NOT_STORE, or ESCALATE with applicable regulations.

tools.name: validate_data_safety_lite
tools.description: Pattern-only screening for high-volume payload batches -- no AI, no IP check, no jurisdiction lookup. Returns SAFE_TO_PROCESS/REVIEW_REQUIRED in under 100ms.

tools.name: get_safety_report
tools.description: Batch classify up to 50 payloads or generate an audit-ready compliance report. Paid tier.
